author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Ship Parts Airdrop

Hey everyone, we just airdropped the promised "Ship Parts" bundles to you on https://play.staratlas.com/ ! 

These bundles include upgraded parts for the ships you held during the snapshot earlier this year. It's our way of saying thank you for being among our earliest supporters and helping us get to where we are.  

These airdropped bundles are also fully tradable on the Galactic Marketplace! This means you can purchase a ship today and grab its upgraded "Ship Parts" bundle from another player. 

 | Learn more about Ship Parts bundles: https://medium.com/star-atlas/into-the-shipyard-exploring-the-ships-framework-in-star-atlas-270f41e5b1be
